## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**APSV3_BEDETAIL** -> APSV3_UBDETAIL (BTM->BTM, ETM->ETM, JS->JS, JSS->JSS, OBT->OBT, RBT->RBT, SEQ->SEQ, WC->SAR)

**APSV3_DEPTMASTER** -> DEPARTMENTS (DEPT -> DEPT_ID)

**APSV3_EMPMASTER** -> APSV3_DEPTMASTER (DEPT -> DEPT); EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPNO -> EMPLOYEE)

**APSV3_EMPWCXREF** -> APSV3_EMPMASTER (EMPNO -> EMPNO); APSV3_WCMASTER (WC -> WC)

**APSV3_JBLINES** -> APSV3_JBMASTER (JOB->JOB, JS->JS, SFX->SFX); APSV3_WCMASTER (SEQRES -> WC); APSV3_WGLINES (SEQRES -> WC); OP_CODES (OPCODE -> OPERATION)

**APSV3_JBMASTER** -> APSV3_JBMASTER (PARENT -> JS); INVENTORY_MSTR (LOC->LOCATION, PART->PART); JOB_HEADER (JOB->JOB, SFX->SUFFIX)

**APSV3_UBDETAIL** -> APSV3_DEPTMASTER (ROG -> DEPT); APSV3_JBLINES (JOB->JOB, SEQ->SEQ, SFX->SFX); APSV3_JBMASTER (JS -> JS); APSV3_WCMASTER (SAR -> WC); APSV3_WGMASTER (RST -> WG); OP_CODES (OPCODE -> OPERATION)

**APSV3_WCMASTER** -> WORKCENTERS (WC -> MACHINE)

**APSV3_WGLINES** -> APSV3_WCMASTER (WC -> WC); APSV3_WGMASTER (WG -> WG)

**APSV3_WGMASTER** -> APSV3_WCMASTER (PROTOWC -> WC)
